-Ot2_NHQ4ISQ1svwbU7k.content:
A Distributed Database System (DDS) stores data across multiple locations or servers.

Advantages:
- Faster access
- Better reliability
- Backup support
- Fault tolerance

Technologies Used:
- React JS
- Firebase Realtime Database
- GitHub API
- Material UI

This project also supports backup and restore using GitHub repositories.
-Ot2_NHQ4ISQ1svwbU7k.title: Distributed Database Concepts
